title: Textron to Release Second Quarter Results on July 28, 2022
text: PROVIDENCE, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Textron Inc. (NYSE: TXT) will release its second quarter 2022 financial results on Thursday morning, July 28, 2022. Textron will also host a conference call at 8:00 a.m. (Eastern) to discuss the results and the company's outlook. The call will be available via webcast at www.textron.com or by direct dial at (844) 867-6169 in the U.S. or (409) 207-6975 outside of the U.S.; Access Code: 6069432. title: What's Driving Textron Stock?
text: After over a 24% fall year-to-date, at the current levels, we believe Textron stock (NYSE: TXT) can see much higher prices.

title: Textron's (TXT) Arm Inks $12.3M Deal to Offer Support to UAS
text: Textron (TXT) announces that it has clinched a modification contract to provide services for unmanned aircraft systems.
